case_title: JENNIE YUEN YAW LAW VS. MERIDIAN MANGEMENT GROUP

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $413.95 FILED BY LAW, JENNIE YUEN YAW AS TO DEFENDANT MERIDIAN MANGEMENT GROUP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-11-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAW, JENNIE YUEN YAW ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-15-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-15-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF JENNIE YUEN YAW LAW IS PRESENT. ASSISTED BY REBECCA CHAU, CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER. DEFENDANT MERIDIAN MANAGMENT GROUP IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY CASEY DIAS, PROPERTY SUPERVISOR. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAW, JENNIE YUEN YAW
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-15-2017 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAW, JENNIE YUEN YAW IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MERIDIAN MANGEMENT GROUP DEFENDANT CONCEDES A RENT OVERPAYMENT WAS MADE BY PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT F $193.95 WHICH DEFENDANT PAID TO PLAINTIFF WHO FAILED TO PROVE ANY HIGHER AMOUNT WAS DUE TO HER. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT MERIDIAN MANGEMENT GROUP
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL [X]GRANTED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-11-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUN-15-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
